flashcards.definition: Duration of car financing; longer terms = lower payments but more interest + risk of being underwater.
Owing more on a loan than the asset is worth — common with long auto loans due to rapid depreciation.
Capitalization Rate = Net Operating Income / Property Value; measures investment property return.
Rental income minus all expenses (mortgage, taxes, insurance, maintenance, vacancy).
The portion of the property you own: market value − remaining mortgage balance.
